name: CONTRACT-BUG-35
title: test-relink-no-skills.py uses 'rbt-feature-touch' symlink check but spec banned rbt- prefix
description: test/test-relink-no-skills.py line 49 checks for 'rabbit-feature-touch' symlink at repo root. The test references the now-deleted relink.sh and is vacuously satisfied. Comments and label vars (T1_LABEL line 47) still reference outdated 'rabbit-feature-touch' linking semantics that are no longer applicable. Either delete the test (relink.sh is gone, build-contract handles deployment) or rewrite for the build-contract model.

history.note: Fixed Wave 3 batch 1: validate-feature.py run.py path; check-naming.py rbt- prefix; module docstrings; runner invokes all tests; dead tests deleted.
